text:
In a land where every forest was a realm full of sentient creatures, there lived a dragon named Drako. Drako was not your average dragon. He had peculiar tastes. Every morning, rather than roaring menacingly, he would curl up next to a fire hydrant and sip on a milkshake. It was quite a sight.

There was a young maiden named Elara who lived in a nearby village. She adored the forest beside her home. One day, while exploring, she discovered Drako's secret. He would soar through the trees, leaving behind shiny milkshake cans — his favourite.

One day, feeling inspired, Elara decided to craft her own milkshake container that resembled Drako. She sculpted it out of clay, painted it with designs of trees and dragons, and when it dried, she gave it a heroic dragon's horn.

She placed the milkshake tin near Drako's favorite spot. The next morning, he saw it! Excited, he flew down
